'''ân-z-l-g''' ('''kanazlegoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:emarginate|emarginate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-z-l-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:emarginate|emarginate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-z-l-g
|-
! Lemma
| kanazlegoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinazlegoko|thinazlegoko]] || [[word:jinazlegoko|jinazlegoko]] || [[word:shinazlegoko|shinazlegoko]] || [[word:kinazlegoko|kinazlegoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunazlegoko|thuthunazlegoko]] || [[word:jujunazlegoko|jujunazlegoko]] || [[word:shushunazlegoko|shushunazlegoko]] || [[word:kukunazlegoko|kukunazlegoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunazlegoko|thunazlegoko]] || [[word:junazlegoko|junazlegoko]] || [[word:shunazlegoko|shunazlegoko]] || [[word:kunazlegoko|kunazlegoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunazlegoko|thunazlegoko]] || [[word:junazlegoko|junazlegoko]] || [[word:shunazlegoko|shunazlegoko]] || [[word:kunazlegoko|kunazlegoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thenazlegoko|thenazlegoko]] || [[word:jenazlegoko|jenazlegoko]] || [[word:shenazlegoko|shenazlegoko]] || [[word:kenazlegoko|kenazlegoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonazlegoko|thothonazlegoko]] || [[word:jojonazlegoko|jojonazlegoko]] || [[word:shoshonazlegoko|shoshonazlegoko]] || [[word:kokonazlegoko|kokonazlegoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonazlegoko|thonazlegoko]] || [[word:jonazlegoko|jonazlegoko]] || [[word:shonazlegoko|shonazlegoko]] || [[word:konazlegoko|konazlegoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonazlegoko|thonazlegoko]] || [[word:jonazlegoko|jonazlegoko]] || [[word:shonazlegoko|shonazlegoko]] || [[word:konazlegoko|konazlegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠnazlegoko|thĂŠnazlegoko]] || [[word:jĂŠnazlegoko|jĂŠnazlegoko]] || [[word:shĂŠnazlegoko|shĂŠnazlegoko]] || [[word:kĂŠnazlegoko|kĂŠnazlegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanazlegoko|thathanazlegoko]] || [[word:jajanazlegoko|jajanazlegoko]] || [[word:shashanazlegoko|shashanazlegoko]] || [[word:kakanazlegoko|kakanazlegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanazlegoko|thanazlegoko]] || [[word:janazlegoko|janazlegoko]] || [[word:shanazlegoko|shanazlegoko]] || [[word:kanazlegoko|kanazlegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanazlegoko|thanazlegoko]] || [[word:janazlegoko|janazlegoko]] || [[word:shanazlegoko|shanazlegoko]] || [[word:kanazlegoko|kanazlegoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
